# Chapter 1: The three laws of thermodynamics  (~120 pp)
- 1.1 Energy as accounting (12) · 1.2 First law: closed and open systems (18) · 1.3 Second law: entropy and direction (20) · 1.4 Third law (8) · 1.5 State functions vs path functions (15) · 1.6 Internal energy, enthalpy, free energies (18) · 1.7 Worked examples: gas compression, mixing, phase change (16) · 1.8 Failure section: perpetual motion machines and how to recognise them in proposals (13)

**Archetype**: balance, scaling. **Project**: instrument a household refrigerator; measure work in, heat out, COP. **Exercises**: 40.
